hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'dev' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ]; then echo '⚠️ REMINDER: Create a feature branch before making changes.'; fi
echo '📝 REMINDER: Commit message should follow conventional format: type(scope): description'
hooks.description: Remind about commit message format before git commit

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'dev' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ]; then echo '❌ BLOCKER: Cannot push directly to '$BRANCH'. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b REN-XXX-description'; exit 1; fi
if git status --porcelain | grep -q .; then echo '❌ BLOCKER: Uncommitted changes detected. Commit all changes before pushing.'; exit 1; fi
hooks.description: Block push if uncommitted changes exist

hooks.command: git fetch origin -q && git log HEAD..origin/dev --oneline | grep -q . && echo '⚠️ WARNING: Branch is behind origin/dev. Consider rebasing first: git rebase origin/dev' || true
hooks.description: Warn if branch is behind main

hooks.command: echo '📋 REMINDER: Use /pre-pr to run complete validation first!'
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'CLAUDE.md\|CONTRIBUTING.md\|AGENTS.md\|README.md'; then echo '📚 REMINDER: High-impact file modified. Update related documentation in this PR.'; fi
hooks.description: Remind about documentation when important files modified

hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '(?<="file_path":")[^"]+' | head -1); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.md$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '✨ Prettier: Formatted'; npx markdownlint-cli "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Markdownlint: OK' || echo '⚠️ Run: npx markdownlint-cli --fix "'$FILE_PATH'"'; fi
hooks.description: Format and lint markdown files after edit

hooks.command:
echo '🚀 Session Started
📖 Remember: @CONTRIBUTING.md workflow
📝 Key commands: /start-work, /check-workflow, /pre-pr, /end-work | Remote: /remote-status, /remote-deploy
📚 Full list (24 commands): see .claude/README.md
💡 Run /check-workflow for current status'
hooks.description: Session start reminder with available commands

hooks.command: git status --porcelain | grep -q . && echo '⚠️ Session ending with uncommitted changes. Use /end-work to complete cleanly.' || echo '✅ Clean session end - no uncommitted changes'
hooks.description: Check for uncommitted work at session end
